action.reasoning: Observation: Rank-normalized blending improved hidden Spearman substantially, and 75/25 rank blend beat 80/20 rank (0.6148 vs 0.6129), indicating the optimum may use more window contribution. Analysis: With less than an hour remaining and evaluation taking about 14–15 minutes, only a few cheap ensemble-weight evaluations are feasible; no retraining is likely to finish profitably. Decision: evaluate a 70/30 rank-normalized baseline/window ensemble to continue tuning the best-performing family.
